summary: HotelRunner Auto-Polling Disabled Feature Testing Complete - All 8 backend tests passed, all frontend tests passed. The automatic polling has been successfully disabled. System now only syncs via event-driven (booking outbox) and manual user actions.
features_tested: Backend: GET /api/channel-manager/hotelrunner/sync/status returns scheduler_running=false and auto_polling_disabled=true - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/channel-manager/hotelrunner/sync/reservations/pull (manual pull) still works - PASSED
Backend: No HR-PULL or HR-QUEUE loop messages in logs - VERIFIED
Backend: Startup message shows 'HotelRunner otomatik polling devre disi' - VERIFIED
Frontend: HRRateManager page loads correctly - PASSED
Frontend: Queue banner shows 'Manuel olarak Simdi Dene butonuyla gonderebilirsiniz' (not 'otomatik') - PASSED
Frontend: 'Simdi Dene' retry button present and clickable - PASSED
Frontend: Auto-polling removed from HRRateManager.jsx (lines 92-93) - VERIFIED by code review
Frontend: StopSalePanel toast message updated to 'Simdi Dene ile gonderebilirsiniz' (line 191) - VERIFIED by code review
critical_code_review_comments: startup.py lines 509-515: HotelRunner auto-polling disabled section correctly implemented - only prints info message, no scheduler/worker start
hotelrunner_sync.py line 716-717: sync/status endpoint correctly returns auto_polling_disabled=true flag
hr_push_queue_worker.py: Push queue worker exists but is NOT auto-started in startup.py
hr_rate_manager_router.py lines 543,585: Messages correctly updated from 'otomatik denenecek' to 'manuel deneyin' / 'Simdi Dene ile gonderebilirsiniz'
HRRateManager.jsx lines 92-93: setInterval for auto-polling removed, queue status only fetched on page load
HRRateManager.jsx line 363: Queue banner text correctly shows 'Manuel olarak Simdi Dene butonuyla gonderebilirsiniz'
StopSalePanel.jsx line 191: Toast message correctly updated to 'Simdi Dene ile gonderebilirsiniz'
context_for_next_testing_agent: HotelRunner auto-polling has been successfully disabled. The system now only syncs via: 1) Event-driven outbox (when bookings are created), 2) Manual pull via POST /api/channel-manager/hotelrunner/sync/reservations/pull, 3) Manual queue retry via POST /api/channel-manager/hr-rate-manager/queue-retry. The queue currently has 2 pending items. Frontend auto-polling (setInterval 30s) has been removed - queue status only fetches on page load.

code_changes_verified.startup.py_lines_509_515: HotelRunner auto-polling disabled section - only prints info message
code_changes_verified.hotelrunner_sync.py_line_716_717: auto_polling_disabled=True flag added to sync/status response
code_changes_verified.HRRateManager.jsx_line_363: Banner text updated to 'Manuel olarak Simdi Dene butonuyla gonderebilirsiniz'
code_changes_verified.StopSalePanel.jsx_line_191: Toast message updated to 'Simdi Dene ile gonderebilirsiniz'
